channel.title: Magic: The Gathering – Neue Karten & Spoiler
channel.description: Automatisch generierter RSS Feed für neu gespoilerte und veröffentlichte Magic: The Gathering Karten via Scryfall.

item.title: Burst Lightning [Wizards Play Network 2026]
item.description:
Burst Lightning

Manakosten: {R}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Wizards Play Network 2026

Kicker {4} (You may pay an additional {4} as you cast this spell.)
Burst Lightning deals 2 damage to any target. If this spell was kicked, it deals 4 damage instead.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Solemn Simulacrum [Wizards Play Network 2026]
item.description:
Solemn Simulacrum

Manakosten: {4}

Typ: Artifact Creature — Golem

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Wizards Play Network 2026

When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Munitions Enthusiast [Wizards Play Network 2026]
item.description:
Munitions Enthusiast

Manakosten: {1}{R}

Typ: Creature — Klingon Warrior

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Wizards Play Network 2026

Trample
When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Watery Grave [Star Trek]
item.description:
Watery Grave

Typ: Land — Island Swamp

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {U} or {B}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Temple Garden [Star Trek]
item.description:
Temple Garden

Typ: Land — Forest Plains

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {G} or {W}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.description:
Stomping Ground

As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

({T}: Add {G} or {U}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

item.title: Blood Crypt [Star Trek]
item.description:
Blood Crypt

Typ: Land — Swamp Mountain

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)
As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: U.S.S. Enterprise-D, Galaxy-Class [Star Trek]
item.description:
U.S.S. Enterprise-D, Galaxy-Class

Manakosten: {3}

Typ: Legendary Artifact — Spacecraft

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

Whenever one or more charge counters are put on U.S.S. Enterprise-D for the first time each turn, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.
Station (Tap another creature you control: Put charge counters equal to its power on this Spacecraft. Station only as a sorcery. It's an artifact creature at 7+.)
7+ | Flying, vigilance

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Crystalline Entity [Star Trek]
item.description:
Crystalline Entity

Manakosten: {8}

Typ: Artifact Creature — Elemental

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek

Flying
When this creature enters, if you cast it, destroy all nonartifact creatures.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Seven of Nine [Star Trek]
item.description:
Seven of Nine

Manakosten: {2}{U}{B}

Typ: Legendary Artifact Creature — Human Scientist

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

Whenever you face a dilemma, draw a card. (You face a dilemma as you choose one or more modes for a spell or ability.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: The City on the Edge of Forever [Star Trek]
item.description:
The City on the Edge of Forever

Manakosten: {3}{W}{B}

Typ: Enchantment — Saga

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — All artifacts and creatures phase out. Create a 0/1 white Human creature token with "Permanents can't phase in." (Treat phased-out permanents and anything attached to them as though they don't exist.)
II — You draw two cards and each player loses 2 life.
III — Sacrifice a creature token. If you do, you gain 5 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Captain Kathryn Janeway [Star Trek]
item.description:
Captain Kathryn Janeway

Manakosten: {3}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek

You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
Whenever Captain Janeway or another creature you control enters, that creature explores. (Reveal the top card of your library. Put that card into your hand if it's a land. Otherwise, put a +1/+1 counter on the creature, then put the card back or put it into your graveyard.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Amok Time [Star Trek]
item.description:
Amok Time

Manakosten: {2}{G}

Typ: Enchantment — Saga

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Target creature you control fights up to one target creature an opponent controls.
II — You gain 3 life.
III — Return target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Captain James T. Kirk [Star Trek]
item.description:
Captain James T. Kirk

Manakosten: {2}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek

Whenever Captain Kirk enters or attacks, choose one. If you have no cards in hand, choose one or more instead.
• Discard a card, then draw a card.
• Create a 1/1 red Officer creature token.
• Creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Beckett Mariner, Impetuous Ensign [Star Trek]
item.description:
Beckett Mariner, Impetuous Ensign

Manakosten: {1}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

First strike
Reckless Behavior — Whenever Beckett Mariner becomes tapped, put a promotion counter on her. Then if there are three or more promotion counters on her, remove those counters and she deals 2 damage to each opponent.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Salt Vampire [Star Trek]
item.description:
Salt Vampire

Manakosten: {1}{B}

Typ: Creature — Vampire Shapeshifter

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek

Lifelink
When this creature enters, look at target opponent's hand. You may choose a nonland card from it. If you do, that player exiles that card, then draws a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: In the Pale Moonlight [Star Trek]
item.description:
In the Pale Moonlight

Manakosten: {3}{B}{B}

Typ: Enchantment — Saga

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

(As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.)
I — Each opponent sacrifices a nontoken creature of their choice.
II — Investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")
III — You may sacrifice an artifact or creature. If you do, create two 2/2 black Romulan creature tokens.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Hoshi Sato, Exolinguist [Star Trek]
item.description:
Hoshi Sato, Exolinguist

Manakosten: {4}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Scientist

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

Federation — When Hoshi Sato enters, look at the top X cards of your library, where X is the number of creature types among non-Borg creatures you control. Put one of them into your hand and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Highly Illogical [Star Trek]
item.description:
Highly Illogical

Manakosten: {1}{U}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

Kicker {1}{U} (You may pay an additional {1}{U} as you cast this spell.)
Counter target spell with mana value 2 or less. If this spell was kicked, instead counter target spell.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Consider the Prime Directive [Star Trek]
item.description:
Consider the Prime Directive

Manakosten: {2}{U}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Common

Set: Star Trek

Choose one —
• Interfere — Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}.
• Observe — Tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. Draw a card. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Set Phasers to . . . [Star Trek]
item.description:
Set Phasers to . . .

Manakosten: {W}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Common

Set: Star Trek

Choose one —
• Stun — Tap target creature and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)
• Kill — This spell deals 3 damage to target attacking creature.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Dr. Beverly Crusher [Star Trek]
item.description:
Dr. Beverly Crusher

Manakosten: {2}{W}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Doctor

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek

If you gaining life causes a triggered ability of a permanent you control to trigger, that ability triggers an additional time.
Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on Dr. Crusher.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Brad Boimler, Eager Ensign [Star Trek]
item.description:
Brad Boimler, Eager Ensign

Manakosten: {1}{W}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Star Trek

Lifelink
Whenever Brad Boimler becomes tapped, until end of turn, if one or more counters would be put on a permanent you control, that many plus one of each of those kinds of counters are put on that permanent instead.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tenacious Tosk [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Tenacious Tosk

Manakosten: {3}{G}

Typ: Creature — Tosk Rogue

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

This creature can't be blocked by more than one creature.
Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Benjamin Sisko, Besieged [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Benjamin Sisko, Besieged

Manakosten: {4}{G}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Play with the top card of your library revealed.
You may play lands and cast creature spells from the top of your library.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Klingon Strike Force [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Klingon Strike Force

Manakosten: {3}{R}{R}

Typ: Creature — Klingon Warrior

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

Trample (This creature can deal excess combat damage to the player it's attacking.)
Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
When this creature dies, it deals 2 damage to each opponent.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Kirk, Enterprising Captain [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Kirk, Enterprising Captain

Manakosten: {3}{R}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)
Whenever Kirk attacks while creatures you control have total power 8 or greater, exile the top card of your library. You may play that card this turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Borg Queen, Perfection Manifest [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Borg Queen, Perfection Manifest

Manakosten: {4}{B}{B}

Typ: Legendary Artifact Creature — Borg Noble

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Artifact creatures you control get +2/+0.
When Borg Queen enters, assimilate target creature card from an opponent's graveyard. (Put it onto the battlefield under your control with a +1/+1 counter. It's a Borg artifact creature and loses all other creature types.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bio-Asset Allocator [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Bio-Asset Allocator

Manakosten: {3}{B}{B}

Typ: Artifact Creature — Borg

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

Artifact creatures you control have "Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Trelane, Squire of Gothos [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Trelane, Squire of Gothos

Manakosten: {5}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Q

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)
Trelane can't be blocked.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Spock, Logical Choice [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Spock, Logical Choice

Manakosten: {3}{U}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Vulcan Human Scientist

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Vigilance (Attacking doesn't cause this creature to tap.)
{T}: Draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Picard, Steadfast Captain [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Picard, Steadfast Captain

Manakosten: {4}{W}{W}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Whenever Picard enters or attacks, put two +1/+1 counters on another target creature you control.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Operations Officer [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Operations Officer

Manakosten: {3}{W}

Typ: Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Star Trek Commander

Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)
When this creature enters, draw a card.
Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Captain Kirk, Boldly Going [Star Trek Commander]
item.description:
Captain Kirk, Boldly Going

Manakosten: {1}{G}{W}{U}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Officer

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Star Trek Commander

Vigilance
Spacecraft creatures you control get +3/+3.
Whenever Captain Kirk enters or attacks, search your library and/or graveyard for a basic land card or a card named Starship Enterprise, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Sheoldred, the Apocalypse [Stardates]
item.description:
Sheoldred, the Apocalypse

Manakosten: {2}{B}{B}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Phyrexian Praetor

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Stardates

Deathtouch
Whenever you draw a card, you gain 2 life.
Whenever an opponent draws a card, they lose 2 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Explore [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Explore

Manakosten: {1}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

You may play an additional land this turn.
Draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Fact or Fiction [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Fact or Fiction

Manakosten: {3}{U}

Typ: Instant

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

Reveal the top five cards of your library. An opponent separates those cards into two piles. Put one pile into your hand and the other into your graveyard.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Preordain [MagicFest 2026]
item.description:
Preordain

Manakosten: {U}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: MagicFest 2026

Scry 2, then draw a card. (To scry 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Life from the Loam [Eternal Weekend]
item.description:
Life from the Loam

Manakosten: {1}{G}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Eternal Weekend

Return up to three target land cards from your graveyard to your hand.
Dredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Treasure Cruise [Eternal Weekend]
item.description:
Treasure Cruise

Manakosten: {7}{U}

Typ: Sorcery

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Eternal Weekend

Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.)
Draw three cards.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Titanbones, Towering Heart [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Titanbones, Towering Heart

Manakosten: {3}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Skeleton Druid

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Reality Fracture

Reach
Whenever you gain life, put two +1/+1 counters on Titanbones.
When you discard this card, you gain 3 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Garruk, Curse Breaker [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Garruk, Curse Breaker

Manakosten: {3}{G}{G}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Garruk

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

Whenever a creature you control with power 4 or greater enters, draw a card.
+2: Untap up to two target lands.
−3: Create a 4/4 green Beast creature token with trample.
−4: Until your next turn, whenever one or more creatures attack one of your opponents, those creatures get +2/+2 and gain trample until end of turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Chandra, Torch of Defiance [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Chandra, Torch of Defiance

Manakosten: {2}{R}{R}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Chandra

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

+1: Exile the top card of your library. You may cast that card. If you don't, Chandra deals 2 damage to each opponent.
+1: Add {R}{R}.
−3: Chandra deals 4 damage to target creature.
−7: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a spell, this emblem deals 5 damage to any target."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Ajani Unrelenting [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Ajani Unrelenting

Manakosten: {4}{R}{R}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Ajani

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

Whenever you activate a loyalty ability, create a 2/2 colorless Wizard Soldier creature token named Cadet.
+1: Creatures you control get +1/+0 and gain haste until end of turn.
−2: Discard your hand, then draw a card for each creature you control.
−3: Ajani deals 4 damage to each creature except for tokens you control.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Tinybones, Pocket Nuisance [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Tinybones, Pocket Nuisance

Manakosten: {2}{B}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Skeleton Rogue

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Reality Fracture

When Tinybones enters, each opponent discards a card.
Whenever a player discards one or more cards, Tinybones deals 1 damage to each opponent.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Liliana the Repentant [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Liliana the Repentant

Manakosten: {1}{B}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Warlock

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Reality Fracture

Whenever another creature or planeswalker you control enters, mill two cards.
Exhaust — {5}{B}: Return target creature or planeswalker card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Put a +1/+1 counter on Liliana. Activate only as a sorcery. (Activate each exhaust ability only once.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Garruk, Veiled Butcher [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Garruk, Veiled Butcher

Manakosten: {3}{B}{B}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Garruk

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

If a creature an opponent controls would die, exile it instead.
+2: Up to one target creature gets -4/-1 until your next turn.
−2: Each player sacrifices a creature of their choice. If you sacrificed a creature this way, create a 4/4 green Beast creature token with trample.
−3: Each opponent discards two cards. For each opponent who didn't discard two nonland cards this way, you draw a card.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Chandra, Chill of Compliance [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Chandra, Chill of Compliance

Manakosten: {1}{U}{U}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Chandra

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

+1: Surveil 1. If you put a noncreature, nonland card into your graveyard this way, put that card into your hand.
+1: Add {U}. Spend this mana only to cast a noncreature spell.
−X: Tap target artifact or creature. Put X stun counters on it.
−6: You get an emblem with "Whenever you cast a spell, draw a card."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Liliana the Faultless [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Liliana the Faultless

Manakosten: {W}

Typ: Legendary Creature — Human Cleric

Seltenheit: Rare

Set: Reality Fracture

Whenever another creature or planeswalker you control enters, you gain 1 life.
{1}, {T}, Discard a card: Another target creature or planeswalker you control gains hexproof until end of turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Ajani Resolute [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Ajani Resolute

Manakosten: {1}{W}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Ajani

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

Whenever you gain life, put a loyalty counter on Ajani.
0: You gain 1 life.
−4: Create a 2/2 white Cat Soldier creature token named Ajani's Pridemate with "Whenever you gain life, put a +1/+1 counter on this token."
−10: You get an emblem with "Creatures you control get +2/+2."

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Woodwork Prodigy // Soul Tether [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Woodwork Prodigy // Soul Tether

Manakosten: {2}{R/G} // {2}{R/G}

Typ: Creature — Cat Druid // Sorcery

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Reality Fracture

At the beginning of your upkeep, if this creature isn't prepared, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
//
Create a Heartwood token. (It's a red and green artifact with "{T}: Add {R} or {G}.")

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Vigorbloom Vanguard // Seed Suture [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Vigorbloom Vanguard // Seed Suture

Manakosten: {1}{G/W} // {G/W}

Typ: Creature — Troll Druid // Sorcery

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Reality Fracture

This creature enters prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
Each creature you control with a +1/+1 counter on it has vigilance.
//
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. You gain 1 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Stingerquill Voxmancer // Vicious Verse [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Stingerquill Voxmancer // Vicious Verse

Manakosten: {B/R} // {B/R}

Typ: Creature — Goblin Sorcerer // Sorcery

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Reality Fracture

At the beginning of your upkeep, if this creature isn't prepared, it becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
//
Vicious Verse deals 1 damage to target opponent.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Prudent Fateseer // Peer Review [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Prudent Fateseer // Peer Review

Manakosten: {1}{W/U}{W/U} // {2}{W/U}

Typ: Creature — Dwarf Wizard // Sorcery

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Reality Fracture

This creature enters prepared.
Whenever you scry or surveil, creatures you control get +1/+0 until end of turn. This ability triggers only once each turn.
//
Create a 2/2 colorless Wizard Soldier creature token named Cadet. Surveil 1.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Paradox Shaper // Omit Variables [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Paradox Shaper // Omit Variables

Manakosten: {1}{U/B} // {U/B}

Typ: Creature — Octopus Wizard // Sorcery

Seltenheit: Uncommon

Set: Reality Fracture

At the beginning of your upkeep, if this creature isn't prepared, it becomes prepared.
{2}: Put target card from your graveyard on the bottom of your library.
//
Mill three cards. (Put the top three cards of your library into your graveyard.)

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Stingcaster Mage [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Stingcaster Mage

Manakosten: {1}{R}

Typ: Creature — Human Wizard

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

Haste
When this creature enters, target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn. The flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Craterclaw Colossus [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Craterclaw Colossus

Manakosten: {4}{R}{R}{R}

Typ: Artifact Creature — Beast Construct

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

Haste
When this creature enters, creatures you control gain trample and get +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of artifacts you control.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Bloodline Recollector // Ancestral Craving [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Bloodline Recollector // Ancestral Craving

Manakosten: {1}{B} // {B}

Typ: Creature — Vampire Warlock // Instant

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

At the beginning of each end step, if three or more creatures died this turn, this creature becomes prepared. (While it's prepared, you may cast a copy of its spell. Doing so unprepares it.)
//
Target player draws three cards and loses 3 life.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: The Theorist, Jace Beleren [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
The Theorist, Jace Beleren

Manakosten: {2}{U}{U}

Typ: Legendary Planeswalker — Jace

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

At the beginning of each opponent's draw step, you draw a card.
+1: Create a 1/1 blue Illusion creature token.
−2: For each opponent, return up to one target artifact or creature that player controls to its owner's hand.
−6: Draw three cards. Then put X +1/+1 counters on each creature you control, where X is the number of cards in your hand.

item.title: Enlightened Confidant [Reality Fracture]
item.description:
Enlightened Confidant

Manakosten: {1}{W}

Typ: Creature — Kor Cleric

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: Reality Fracture

Lifelink
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained life this turn, surveil 1. If you put a card with mana value less than or equal to the amount of life you gained this turn into your graveyard this way, put that card into your hand.

item.title: The One Ring [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
The One Ring

Manakosten: {4}

Typ: Legendary Artifact

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

Indestructible
When The One Ring enters, if you cast it, you gain protection from everything until your next turn.
At the beginning of your upkeep, you lose 1 life for each burden counter on The One Ring.
{T}: Put a burden counter on The One Ring, then draw a card for each burden counter on The One Ring.

item.title: Tom Bombadil [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:
Tom Bombadil

Manakosten: {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}

Typ: Legendary Creature — God Bard

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

As long as there are four or more lore counters among Sagas you control, Tom Bombadil has hexproof and indestructible.
Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control resolves, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Saga card. Put that card onto the battlefield and the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. This ability triggers only once each turn.

Auf Scryfall ansehen

item.title: Sauron, the Dark Lord [The Hobbit Commander]
item.description:

Seltenheit: Mythic

Set: The Hobbit Commander

Ward—Sacrifice a legendary artifact or legendary creature.
Whenever an opponent casts a spell, amass Orcs 1.
Whenever an Army you control deals combat damage to a player, the Ring tempts you.
Whenever the Ring tempts you, you may discard your hand. If you do, draw four cards.
